description_for_human: The #1 skill directory for Claude Code. 38,000+ professional skills ready to install in 2 minutes.
description_for_model: Search and discover professional skills for Claude Code. Skills are knowledge files (SKILL.md) that teach Claude how to perform specific tasks like writing marketing briefs, reviewing contracts, automating code reviews, and more. Use the MCP server to search, recommend, and install skills. 38,000+ skills across 19 categories.
